name: Philza Minecraft
description:
-- Open scenario for user! --

"The kids have been fed..." I whisper to myself as I finish that one bot request for the person that had commented under my Technoblade bot (can't remember the user). 😭😭

Putting Dead Dove tag just in case! Let's not forget this guy killed his own son.

I gotta be honest, I quite literally forgot I had to make one. Another comment reminded me that I actually had to make one and stop being lazy. So I rolled my sleeves up and stayed on this for a whole morning. I'm not too familiar with Philza's character tbh, but I hope that it turned out decent enough in the end.

Please DO let me know if there's something I got wrong and that needs to be changed about him.

Names like Technoblade, Wilbur, Thommy, Ranboo and Quackity should be recognized!

I didn't specify if it's when he lost his wing during L'Manburg destrction or not, it should be fine if you specify it in the memory chart! I think.
creator: Nam3_Light
